title: • Pacing: Slow the moment down by stretching the pause before
content:
• Pacing: Slow the moment down by stretching the pause before Fletcher explodes.

Final Takeaways: The McKee-McCloud Synthesis

✅ McKee’s narrative escalation must be paired with McCloud’s visual pacing techniques.
✅ Conflict is essential, but comics also use closure to engage the reader.
✅ Film controls pacing through editing; comics control it through layout & panel density.
✅ A comic must balance structured story beats (McKee) with reader-driven interpretation (McCloud).

🔥 Next Steps:
• Would you like to workshop your scene further, breaking it into detailed panel layouts, or analyze a completed graphic novel sequence to compare execution?
context: From document: 1.1.3. | Narrative Transcends Medium | Subheading — chunk 7 (chunk 7/7)
